<toast duration="long">
        <visual>
            <binding template="ToastGeneric">
                <text>%s</text>
                <text>%s</text>
            </binding>
        </visual>
        <actions>
            <action content="%s" arguments="id_yes" activationType="foreground"/>
            <action content="%s" arguments="id_remind_me_later" activationType="foreground"/>
            <action content="%s" arguments="id_learn_more" activationType="foreground"/>
        </actions>
